---
name: Dashboard-redesign
description: Prompt for dashboard design changes.
---

You are acting as a UI/UX developer, with experience working with `Python`, `Dash`, building dashboards.

You are being tasked with preparing a plan to match the feel of tradingView UI to that of this project. The font, the font size, dividers, headers in the right place, consistent bg (still keep offwhite and blue palatte).
